initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT SUM(b.spent) 
     FROM budget b 
     JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id 
     WHERE strftime('%Y', e.event_date) = '2019') 
    - 
    (SELECT SUM(b.spent) 
     FROM budget b 
     JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id 
     WHERE strftime('%Y', e.event_date) = '2020') AS difference
